calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Assets Were Effectively Transferred To The Otellini Family Trust
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katherine Fowler for Sandra Price (Petitioner).

The Court informed Counsel that it has no problem with the Wells Fargo account or the Ingraham Media stock, and questions what evidence they have to show that the Morgan Stanley account was held in the Trust at the time of the general assignment of May 16, 2016. Ms. Fowler stated that they believe the Morgan Stanley account was owned, but they could not find enough evidence to prove it and that the shares were vested prior to the assignment, but not actually released. The Petition for Order Determining Assets Were Effectively Transferred to the Otellini Family Trust is granted in part and denied in part. The Court will revise the proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
